scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Yale uses a test-flexible policy that requires first-year applicants to submit scores from one or more of the following: ACT, AP, IB, or SAT.

claims.claim: Yale uses a test-flexible policy that requires first-year applicants to submit scores from one or more of the following: ACT, AP, IB, or SAT.
